CustomField.formula:
CASE( leaseworks__Insurance_Requirement__r.leaseworks__Requirement_Type__c , "TextArea", leaseworks__Text_Reinsurance__c , "Long Text Area", leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Text_Reinsurance__c, "Percentage", IF( ISNULL( leaseworks__Percentage_Reinsurance__c ) , '',TEXT( leaseworks__Percentage_Reinsurance__c * 100 ) + '%') ,
"Currency", IF( ISNULL( leaseworks__Currency_Reinsurance__c ) , '', '$' + IF( leaseworks__Currency_Reinsurance__c >= 1000000, TEXT(FLOOR(leaseworks__Currency_Reinsurance__c / 1000000)) & ",", "") & IF( leaseworks__Currency_Reinsurance__c >= 1000, RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR(leaseworks__Currency_Reinsurance__c / 1000)), 3) & ",", "") & RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR(leaseworks__Currency_Reinsurance__c )), 3) & "." & IF( MOD(leaseworks__Currency_Reinsurance__c , 1) * 100 < 10, "0" & TEXT(ROUND(MOD(leaseworks__Currency_Reinsurance__c , 1), 2) * 100), TEXT(MIN(ROUND(MOD(leaseworks__Currency_Reinsurance__c , 1), 2) * 100, 99)) )) , "Date", TEXT( leaseworks__Date_Reinsurance__c ) , "Number", TEXT( leaseworks__Number_Reinsurance__c ) , "Checkbox", IF( leaseworks__Selection_Reinsurance__c , "Yes", IF( CreatedDate == LastModifiedDate , "" , "No")) , "")
CustomField.label: Reinsurance Certificate Terms
